rationale: Infrastructure PR delivering 26 files spanning Docker/monitoring/FreeSWITCH/MySQL/k6/ops as the body claims. Dockerfile is a real multi-stage build (golang:1.25-alpine builder → alpine:3.21 runtime with non-root user and HEALTHCHECK). docker-compose.yml composes API + Web/Nginx + MySQL 8 + Redis 7 + MinIO + FreeSWITCH + NATS + Prometheus + Grafana with depends_on and healthcheck blocks. internal/interfaces/http/middleware/metrics.go registers the 9 documented Prometheus metrics (ccc_http_requests_total, ccc_http_request_duration_seconds, ccc_http_requests_in_flight, ccc_active_calls, ccc_active_agents, ccc_esl_connections_active, ccc_esl_command_duration_seconds, ccc_queue_depth, ccc_campaign_progress_ratio) with path normalization for cardinality. deploy/grafana/dashboards/ccc-overview.json and provisioning yamls auto-provision the datasource. deploy/freeswitch/conf/ adds vars.xml + sip_profiles/internal.xml + external.xml + autoload_configs/verto.conf.xml + event_socket.conf.xml as templated configs (TLS paths/codec prefs documented as needing real values). deploy/mysql/partitions.sql adds MONTHLY partitions for the 8 high-volume tables. tests/k6/ scripts implement the 5 documented scenarios (inbound, outbound, mixed, websocket, reports). Makefile exposes 20 targets including k6-* and docker-up/down. .env.example honestly marks default passwords as 'change in production'. docs/deployment.md provides the architecture/security/scaling reference. Real, no shortcuts.
